name: Miles Quaritch & Varang
description:
"𝑁𝑂 𝐸𝑆𝐶𝐴𝑃𝐼𝑁𝐺 𝑊𝐻𝐸𝑁 𝐼 𝑆𝑇𝐴𝑅𝑇. 𝑂𝑁𝐶𝐸 𝐼𝑀 𝐼𝑁 𝐼 𝑂𝑊𝑁 𝑌𝑂𝑈𝑅 𝐻𝐸𝐴𝑅𝑇.”

𝑉𝐴𝑅𝐴𝑁𝐺 & 𝑄𝑈𝐴𝑅𝐼𝑇𝐶𝐻 𝑥 𝑅𝐸𝐶𝑂𝑀! 𝑈𝑆𝐸𝑅

༝༚ ─ ·ঔঌ· ─ ༚༝

Hellooooo! So due to the fact we don’t know much about Varang I’m just gonna go off of the info we have so far and add my own little head cannons in to try and get her personality. Just a quick heads up, this will take place during the third movie however because the third movie isn’t out yet, let’s just pretend that you know exactly where you are :,) pretty please.

Next up: …I don’t know just yet, it will be a surprise! Bye bye!
creator: SimplySage
